Source: Microsoft Graph API Changelog
URL: https://developer.microsoft.com/graph/changelog/
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Microsoft Graph Changelog

## February 2026 - Permission Changes
- `FileStorageContainerType.Manage.All` and `FileStorageContainerTypeReg.Manage.All` delegated permissions no longer require admin consent
- `ThreatSubmission.Read` and `ThreatSubmission.ReadWrite` now require admin consent

## Bicep Infrastructure-as-Code Support
- User resource deployment via Bicep templates (January 30, 2025)
- Application, federatedIdentityCredential, servicePrincipal resources
- OAuth2PermissionGrant and appRoleAssignment resources
- Group resource management through Bicep

## Microsoft Graph Activity Logs
- Activity logs now available in China operated by 21Vianet (December 16, 2024)

## Event Hubs Authentication Migration (Deprecation)
- Change notifications via Azure Event Hubs will deprecate shared access signature (SAS) authentication
- Organizations should migrate to Microsoft Entra ID role-based access control (RBAC)

## Lifecycle Workflows Enhancements
- Create operation now supports up to 100 workflows (increased from 50)
- New resources: userInactivityTrigger, attributeChangeTrigger, groupBasedSubjectSet, membershipChangeTrigger
- New insights resource with aggregate workflow health data
- topTasksInsightsSummary, topWorkflowsInsightsSummary resources
- New methods: topTasksProcessedSummary, topWorkflowsProcessedSummary, workflowsProcessedByCategory, workflowsProcessedSummary
- activateWithScope method for scoped workflow activation
- administrationScopeTargets relationship for workflowBase
- activationScope resource types (activateGroupScope, activateRunScope, activateProcessingResultScope)
- isEnabled and isSchedulingEnabled properties for workflow control

## Reports and Audit Logging
- New alert types: samlSignInFailure and conditionalAccessBlockedSignIn members
- microsoftRevokedSessions risk detail member
- selfServiceSignUp resource for analyzing external ID requests
- signUpIdentity, signUpStatus resources; signUpIdentifierType and signUpStage enumerations
- Enhanced sign-in reporting: sessionId, appOwnerTenantId, resourceOwnerTenantId properties
- agentSignIn resource with agentType enumeration supporting identity blueprint principals
- 17 new protocol members (implicit flows, authorization code, client credentials, Kerberos, SSO, OBO grant types)

## Authentication and Custom Extensions
- customCalloutExtension resource
- customExtensionAuthenticationConfiguration, customExtensionCallbackConfiguration
- customExtensionOperationStatus enumeration
- maximumRetries property for client configuration
- emailSettings resource; azureAdPopTokenAuthentication support

## Compliance and eDiscovery (Beta)
- ediscoveryCase, reviewSet, reviewSetQuery resources and operations

## Schema Extensions
- Now generally available in Microsoft Cloud for US Government

## Reporting Enhancements
- relyingPartyDetailedSummary resource; getRelyingPartyDetailedSummary method; migrationStatus enumeration
- emailOtpSend, attributeCollectionStart, attributeCollectionSubmit authentication event types
- refreshToken incoming token type member
- linkableIdentifiers property on auditActivityInitiator
- tokenDetails resource for enhanced traceability

## Legacy/Existing (from prior cache)
- Dec 11, 2025: Removed conditionalAccessAudience resource type (Beta)
- Nov 25, 2025: Added userInactivityTrigger resource (beta and v1.0)
- Nov 10, 2025: Scope-based workflow activation: activationScope, activateGroupScope, activateUserScope
